title: Open workspaces in a new tab
excerpt: I find that when I am working with different workspaces, I am constantly going back and forth and I have to manually open them in a new tab which is super annoying. Just like you can click on the 3 dots on the left side …

posts.author: tara (tara)
posts.cookedHtml: I find that when I am working with different workspaces, I am constantly going back and forth and I have to manually open them in a new tab which is super annoying. Just like you can click on the 3 dots on the left side next to a board name to open a new tab, you should be able to open a workspace that way. It will make the user experience much easier.

posts.author: Ian1 (Ian Burgess-Simpson)
posts.cookedHtml: Absolutely - it would make a huge difference to navigational functionality!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: This is great feedback and a great suggestion! We recommend posting this as a feature request via our Submit an Idea - monday Community Forum link. The more visibility and votes it gets, the better!

posts.author: tara (tara)
posts.cookedHtml: @BiancaT I thought this was the submit an idea section?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Oh yes you’re correct, my apologies, not sure what happened there
